description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-format-date`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-format-date/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 25 defects — 4 P0, 11 P1, 10 P2, 0 P3

### P0 — Critical
- [ ] [P0] `_formatAbsolute` has no try/catch around `Intl.DateTimeFormat` constructor
- [ ] [P0] axe-core test covers only one variant; relative mode is never tested by axe
- [ ] [P0] `render` function passes empty strings for undefined format options
- [ ] [P0] No Drupal documentation exists

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
title: Audit Fix: hx-format-date
